lessons.title: While Loop
lessons.description: Repeat code as long as a condition is true.

lessons.title: Do-While Loop
lessons.description: A variant that always executes the code at least once.

lessons.title: For Loop
lessons.description: The best loop for running code a specific number of times.

lessons.title: Break and Continue
lessons.description: Learn to stop or skip parts of a running loop.

lessons.title: Nested Loops
lessons.description: Place loops inside of other loops for complex tasks.
